name: flighttracker-workflows
description: Safe workflows for reviewing travel email threads and preparing reply drafts.

interface.shortDescription: Prepare safe drafts in live travel email threads.
interface.longDescription: Adds a careful workflow for finding live travel conversations, verifying itinerary details, and creating or updating Gmail reply drafts without sending them.
defaultPrompt: Review this travel email thread and draft a reply.
Find my reservation email and summarize next steps.
Update the existing draft without sending it.
